title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 316.180 - Penalty for violation
text:
316.180.  Penalty for violation. — Any person who violates the provisions of sections 316.150 to 316.185 is guilty of a misdemeanor and shall, upon conviction, be punished as provided by law.  Any violation of sections 316.150 to 316.185 shall be grounds for an injunction against the festival which may be applied for by either the state of Missouri or the county.
(L. 1975 S.B. 323 § 7) 
Effective 7-16-75
